title: Audio Book Revolution has arrived! 135 Gigabytes on our phones means it!

enrichment.summary: Kyle is excited about a new 2016-era Motorola smartphone with a large expandable storage card (around 120-189 GB), which he sees as enabling people to store and manage huge collections of free historical audiobooks from LibriVox. He discusses creating custom playlists by mixing chapters and snippets across different books, essentially building new 'books' from existing audio content.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: a major leap — it's essentially a full computer now
everyone should have them; they're the important ones people need to know
unprecedented and exciting — you can effectively create your own books by mixing snippets

So you don't have to worry about the batteries always on.
